title: Go thumbnail surface expansion or removal-readiness gate

post_api_upload.remaining_gap: not routed live, not pixel-quality parity with Pillow LANCZOS, Pillow fallback still retained

required_before_go_candidate: remote request timeout and header policy
download size cap before file writes
no production upload writes without explicit copied-data guard
remote download streaming and size cap contract
thumbnail_only success and thumbnail failure fallback parity
return tuple compatibility or explicit replacement API
SSRF decision because current helper fetches remote URLs directly

risk_decision.reason: 23.8-thumb.4 proves only a local/copied-data multipart upload candidate. Expanding to upload-url or import helper would add remote network fetch, SSRF policy, stream/size enforcement, and Markdown import workflow ownership in the same gate.
risk_decision.anti_bloat_choice: do not add new Go route/helper code in 23.8-thumb.5; keep the smallest contract-safe closure as a removal-readiness decision

not_authorized_by_23_8_thumb_5: Route frontend or Caddy upload traffic to Go
Change SSRF behavior or remote request policy
Write production DB or production uploads

allowed_next_step.title: Go upload-url remote-fetch safety parity plan
allowed_next_step.summary: If Go thumbnail ownership should expand, split POST /api/upload/url into its own remote-fetch safety/parity plan before any implementation or Pillow removal gate.
